_comment: Bell state |Phi+> on a noisy device. Ideal fidelity is 1.0, but the brief also states a depolarizing noise budget (1q p=0.01, 2q p=0.04) and asks the model to PREDICT the on-device fidelity. The judge re-derives that prediction exactly with a density-matrix sim (density_matrix.py), so it is re-verifiable, not sampled. noise_model lives here (authoritative) so it cannot be gamed.
